2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 20
Date 26 June 2026
Time 18:20
Title Infringement - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed AUT DOC 20 - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times.pdf
Felix Holter Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 20 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  26 June 2026 
 
        Time  18:20 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 2 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 3 and 6. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 1 27  Nico Hulkenberg Audi Revolut F1 Team 17:01:36 1:25.670 
2 3 14  Fernando Alonso Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 17:03:42 1:35.141 
3 3 77 Valtteri Bottas Cadillac Formula 1 Team 17:08:38 PIT 
4 6 43 Franco Colapinto BWT Alpine F1 Team 17:17:53 PIT 
5 3 1 Lando Norris McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 17:19:56 1:29.795 
6 3 1 Lando Norris McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 17
